## Source: amazon-inspector (11f2fdea43a54f2aac247e06fcc46c506979a5b1ccb5d178077662e61f747b74)
The package jslint-config was found to contain malicious code.

## Source: ossf-package-analysis (b759b345e0ed809730a90556110527d6f94c14b68d118872334ccb7949fd874b)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'jslint-config' @ 10.22.2 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
